meta.source: Coaching VOD counter guide (qualitative, single-expert opinion)
meta.shelf_life: Re-validate every season; heroes, team-ups, and matchups shift. Do NOT treat as evergreen.
meta.role_in_engine: Supplies ONLY the counterability + counter-graph inputs. Meta strength, pick/ban/win rates, enemy pool concentration, and per-hero performance deltas must come from the stat API (rivalsmeta / marvelrivalsapi), not this file.
meta.ban_logic: counterability LOW  -> ban_value HIGH (hard to answer via pick).  counterability HIGH -> ban_value LOW (just counter-pick it).  counterability CONDITIONAL -> depends on whether OUR comp can deliver the required mechanism; resolve at runtime against our comfort pool.

answer_heroes.comment: If OUR team is comfortable on one of these, subtract the heroes it answers from the ban candidate list BEFORE scoring. This is the highest-leverage rule in the engine.

Peni Parker.note: Map/defense-setup dependent; weak when forced to take space.

Magneto.note: Hard counter to ult-reliant heroes via forced-fire ult.

White Fox.note: Support answer to dive; weak vs hitscan-from-range in isolation.

Invisible Woman.note: Push/pull peel; victim to Deadpool_Tank pistol and to range-poke.

Angela.notes: Flyer; punished by grounding+burst and by CC-immune tanks.

Captain America.notes: Stall/space tank; many anti-dive answers, any non-squishy DPS trades.

Deadpool_Tank.notes: Jack-of-all-master-of-none; lose to brawl, ignorable by full dive.

Devil Dinosaur.notes: Strongest brawler; beat via hard-poke-from-range OR full dive that ignores him. Weak to anti-heal.

Doctor Strange.notes: Lukewarm vs field, few weaknesses; only CC stacking truly frustrates him.

Emma Frost.notes: Squishy when shield down; force diamond-form defensively; weak to mobility off-angles.

Groot.notes: Map-dependent oppressive; beat by wall-break stacking OR heroes that go over walls.

Hulk.notes: Squishy without bubble; conserve CC for post-bubble window. Peni hard-counter.

Magneto.notes: Good vs poke/field but bullied hard by displacement; struggles vs multi-dive. Himself an answer hero.

Peni Parker.notes: Polarizing; ANSWER hero vs melee/dive. Beat by range/spam/spread damage; clear nests as tank.

Rogue.notes: High mobility/survivability; answer with range-from-safety + CC during float/slam.

Thing.notes: Polarizing ANSWER hero vs all dive/melee. Beat by burst/poke-from-range he can't trade into.

Thor.notes: Jack-of-trades but squishy; dies to stacked CC + burst. Invis/White Fox strong.

Venom.notes: Feels unkillable if you all-shoot him; real answer is interrupting grapple-out window + marking pre-dive. Loki is free food FOR Venom.

Black Cat.notes: Momentum menace; needs burst+mobility to answer. Thing denies hard. Protect the focused teammate.

Black Panther.notes: Feast-or-famine; Thing shuts him out, pre-dive pressure widens his uptime problem. LOW ban value -- counter instead.
Black Panther.ban_note: Jeff is free food for BP -- avoid Jeff into him.

Black Widow.notes: Deadly with aim but glaring weaknesses; a SECOND diver breaks her; close gap inside kick range. LOW ban value.

Blade.notes: Thrives on sustain vs low-burst comps; add burst/CC and he folds. Loses pound-for-pound. LOW ban value.

Daredevil.notes: Menace; bait the reflect, mark pre-dive, stay calm. Conditional on having mark + composure.

Deadpool_DPS.notes: Weak pre-levels (abuse early); scales to menace. Standard anti-dive answers; respect overtime ult.

Elsa.notes: No glaring bad matchups; value is the ult -- deny ult clustering. Divers can pressure her.

Hawkeye.notes: Black-Widow weaknesses but worse; folds completely to mobility/dive/off-angles. LOW ban value.

Hela.notes: Lethal with aim vs DPS; weaker vs mobile tanks. Deny sightlines, close fast.

Human Torch.notes: Permaflyer; grounding + hitscan answer cleanly. Luna/Adam dominate. LOW-MED ban value.

Iron Fist.notes: Tank-buster; discipline vs block/deflect is everything. White Fox out-brawls him. Conditional on disciplined burst.

Iron Man.notes: Less mobile than Torch; Magneto hard-counters (180 cancels his ult value). LOW ban value.

Magik.notes: Oppressive in close corridors; melee-shutdown tanks + any CC + range answer her. LOW-MED ban value.

Mr Fantastic.notes: Cooldown-read dependent; killable in big-body/ult; poke-from-range beats him. Force out the Dorito.

Moon Knight.notes: MUST-ANSWER threat; if your comp can hunt him (mobility tank/dive DPS) ban value LOW, else HIGH. Don't turtle.

Namor.notes: Few bad matchups; good vs field. Kill the squids constantly. HIGH ban value.

Jean Grey.notes: 'No counters'; good vs nearly the whole field. Beat only by setting your own terms + range-advantage heroes. HIGH ban value.

Psylocke.notes: Scales with skill, sets terms; burst-from-range + divers + mirror-mark answer. Loki is the support counter.

Scarlet Witch.notes: TTK problem; any fast-killing hero + CC punishes. Skill-floor counter (needs your aim). LOW ban value except low-skill lobbies.

Spider-Man.notes: Fragile, telegraphed; punish hardest while he's mid-combo on someone else. Conditional on mechanics/sustain. Save anti-ult CC.

Squirrel Girl.notes: MUST-ANSWER like Moon Knight; 'too easy to kill' IF you hunt with mobility/range-tanks. Shoot the ult squirrels.

Star-Lord.notes: No overwhelming weakness; skill-based. Don't over-extend engagements (he wins long fights). Magneto folds his ult.

Storm.notes: Low/short flight, clumps with team; grounding + hitscan answer. Punisher ult counters her ult. LOW ban value.

Punisher.notes: Susceptible to multi-angle dive; Magneto beats him straight up; needs protection. Ban value usually from META not counterability.

Bucky.notes: Good vs low-tier picks, bad vs long-range + all-in dive; zoned by frontline. Deny the ult reset. Don't get hooked.

Wolverine.notes: Devastates non-CC-immune tanks; answer = CC-immune bodies + burst to shoot him + Invis pull. Break his overshield. Conditional on having the answer.

Adam.notes: Strong if allowed free off-angles; hunt him, force soul bond early, deny free ults.

Cloak and Dagger.notes: 'Straight up killable' -- bait/force the bubble, re-engage, kill. Transcript explicitly says DON'T ban, just kill. LOW ban value.

Deadpool_Strat.notes: Strong in all-in brawl/triple-support; respect ult, give space rather than mirror. LOW-MED ban value.

Gambit.notes: Transcript: 'best way to deal is banning him.' Good vs field, killable but strong, huge ult, cleanse. HIGHEST ban value -- and matches API top ban rate.

Invisible Woman.notes: All-round vs dive; worn down by range (Punisher) and ignored by Magneto. Needs coordinated 2-person dive to punish. No true bad matchups. Also an answer hero.

Jeff.notes: Menace vs hard-to-interact heroes; flat-damage DPS kill him underwater. Need an anti-ult plan (mobility / CC-immune / sandbag ult). Conditional.

Loki.notes: Battle of cooldowns; pressure clones/teleport/totems, fight only when forced out. Venom/Thor extra value.

Luna.notes: Very strong; tanks counter better than DPS; full dive comp is her weakness. Ban value often from META.

Mantis.notes: Triple-support enabler; punish overaggression, kill-through-ult combos (Groot+combo), starve the comp's lone DPS. Beat the system, not the hero.

Rocket.notes: No CC, weak damage; relentless chase + hitscan beats him; pre-break res beacons. Counter his ult by walking on it.

Ultron.notes: Triple-support skybox; deny high ground with hitscan/burst, Magneto ult, Angela. Divers weak into him.

White Fox.notes: Elite vs dive/brawl; weak ONLY to hitscan-from-range in isolation; with a dive comp she beats even her counters. Also an answer hero.
